---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Information, pdfs, and social metrics of papers"
title-block-banner: false
css: custom.css
---

[{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1443-0955){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm target="_blank"}
[{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=jPlDiR8AAAAJ&hl=pt-BR){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm target="_blank"}
[{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Juan-Benavides-Tocarruncho?ev=hdr_xprf){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm target="_blank"}

---

{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}

[![Graphic abstract](/files/images/Graphical_abstract_Benavides_etal.2024.png){width="500"}](https://doi.org/10.1017/S0266467424000129)

Benavides-Tocarruncho JP, Paz H, Rodríguez N, Arrieta R, Pizano C, Salgado-Negret B. [Belowground differentiation among trees in a degraded tropical dry forest landscape: no evidence of a collaboration gradient.](https://doi.org/10.1017/S0266467424000129). *Journal of Tropical Ecology*. 2024;40:e15. doi:10.1017/S0266467424000129

::: {.altmetric-embed data-badge-popover="right" data-badge-type="1" data-doi="10.1017/S0266467424000129" data-hide-no-mentions="true"}
:::

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
